objectives.description: Implement SESSION_ID generation, task lookup, terminal status guard
Add documentation header explaining source convention
Implement defensive status correction using safe jq pattern (no !=)
Include non-blocking artifact validation via validate-artifact.sh --fix
Test gate-in with valid task, terminal-status task, non-existent task
Test gate-out with stale status scenario
objectives.note: Dry run with mock .return-meta.json and syntax check passed
